DeliveredScope: Docker and Podman runtime selection through one interface
Per-version host ports and bounded SMALL, MEDIUM, and LARGE profiles
Process-scoped secret transfer without generated Compose secrets
Optional framework installation through the canonical standalone installer
Exact-ID and label-bound Status and Destroy actions
Docker and Podman Compose overrides with shared portable core
ExternalEvidenceRequired: Native x86-64 Linux Docker runtime execution
Native x86-64 Linux Podman compose runtime execution
Three-version sequential and explicitly approved parallel execution
Framework installation and repeated update execution
Persistent and temporary data cleanup behavior
KnownLimitations: The initial vertical slice is limited to native x86-64 Linux.
Start, Stop, Restart, Reset, and UpdateFramework are planned follow-up lifecycle actions.
Real Docker and Podman runtime evidence remains NOT_EXECUTED until an approved host is available.
Default image references use explicit Microsoft version tags; digest binding remains an optional caller-side follow-up for the quick-test lane.
